IApiBuilder Interface

One Identity Manager API Server
Provides functionality to build an API definition.

Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513

C#

public interface IApiBuilder

The IApiBuilder type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
Resolver
Provides access to registered services.

Methods
  NameDescription
AddCallback
AddMethod
Adds a new method definition.
AddPlugin
Modify
Modifies every method that matches the predicate.

Top
Remarks

The following is a list of services which are resolvable during both API initialization and API runtime processing.

  • IApiEventService
  • IApiAedsMapping
  • IExtensibilityService
  • IExceptionService
  • IModifierService
  • IMethodSetProvider
  • IRouteActivator
  • IRouteVerbPermissionProvider
  • IHttpHeaderConfig
  • ISessionProvider
  • CorsOptions
